---
title: "Uncertainty in<br>Machine Learning"
author:
  - name: "Oliver Hennhöfer"
    affiliation: "Content"
  - name: "Qiongdan Shang"
    affiliation: "Design & Layout"
date: "March 29, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles/custom.scss]
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    slide-number: false
    include-after-body: scripts/smoke-include.html
---

## Slide 1

Lecture content will appear here.

## Slide 2

Lecture content will appear here.
